name: Active + Passive Combination
description: The combination of an active monitoring platform (e.g. EXFO Evolver) with a passive probe platform (e.g. RADCOM ACE) creates a complete subscriber experience picture that neither can provide alone.
howItWorks: Active probes provide network-wide quality baselines from fixed test points. Passive probes identify which real subscribers are affected when quality degrades. The combination enables economic prioritisation: the active probe detects the problem, the passive probe identifies who is affected and their ARPU value, enabling targeted intervention within the intervention window defined by Law II.
